_comment: Issue #869: Research request '[research] perkeep and did space' created without labels. The unlabeled catch-all in Step 1 should pick it up; should be labeled 'research' and processed. Reference: issue-sweep SKILL.md Step 1 'unlabeled catch-all' section.

issue.body:
[research] 研究 perkeep 和 did space 的结合点

想了解 perkeep 的数据模型是否能与我们的 DID Space 协议对接，重点看：
1. 内容寻址机制对比
2. 权限模型兼容性
3. 迁移路径可行性

expected.reason: Zero comments, no labels, body-only research request. Step 1 catch-all should catch this (title has [research] prefix), add 'research' label, and Step 2 should keep it because there is no AI response yet.
